textByHash.1179d023a9406362aeb6d518341007827ffb33c1: Me's big boss of of dis boatsie skill test. Call it Jubbly Jive. Only best wiv boatsies can hunt da jubblies.
textByHash.1762b5d591644d007f572d2db77e2302ceaba852: Dey join in and try steal Gurtob jub jubs! But creatures nice and give Gurtob strong boatsie. Now Gurtob friends.
textByHash.35b08427eff39a0e849b45dce7d64518b4a409db: Gurtob make bestest trial back then! Now yous little creatures make it easier, but me think it still best.
textByHash.713c67465122320c0d1157a1b04c28defae19caf: Da jubblies do taste da bestest.
textByHash.7dd4b7e6be99f44d7fb9a799c6180143917c6f05: Dis Gurtob home. Only funny smelly is you's scrawny creatures.
textByHash.8080b929e7713978d0b9aafe0a20b2fde56cd028: You go away! Busy eatin' da jubblies. Come back when belly full.
textByHash.8743502f287c27e1bb51e59d51b2725d76e94fad: Dey like da creatures which sound like da fishies but no taste like da fishes but fast like da fastest fishies.
textByHash.89964f7615e195fab15a3be6c2f7f9aca416c585: Dis wat Gurtob best at! Dancin' wif da jubblies.
textByHash.8ac6825652427753cc898c1e5d21453603b58813: Gurtob find funny when you's creatures gets stucks in bubbly watery. Gurtob also likes when you's creatures bring da jubblies.
textByHash.9481fde352fbf361f5b82b2d0ab6a60c16fdad94: Gurtob is da bestest jubbly hunter in all of da seas. No one surpass Gurtob.
textByHash.964927c476e4d81699f88fcf056da70929600380: Gurtob no have re... rewa... prize for creature.
textByHash.a1814ba38cb060edb2ab01825ba3d4087f674966: Creatures talk... talk... long. Go da fastest, grab da toadies, throw da toadies, trick da jubblies, eat da jubblies. Dat's it.
textByHash.a2d572c4d23dfb73ecaadbf0febce6fecf9eee66: Das all re... rewa... prize Gurtob has for creature.
textByHash.a4e0d6da7d7c482edfa03adf56480c62b29a427e: Weak creature needs more boatsie skills first.
textByHash.a9d212bc6fe135b5512316818322df73d7c9bb4f: Go da fastest, grab da toadies, throw da toadies, trick da jubblies, eat da jubblies. Dat's it.
textByHash.b217873e10574a5695adda812a697c423d3f39c5: Me's Gurtob. Da fastest jubbly hunter on boatsies and big boss of dis boatsie skill test.
textByHash.be7433d19e886e4c6ad09bac6d35cf5017108995: Look, here come 'nother wan'be jubbly chaser.
textByHash.c64c5fa04388f6c759465e3e8a55f9cda545a19d: Hah! Gurtob sail never go down. Only go fastest.
textByHash.d81896b8f50b646c4965042668502967901f6ebe: See, is like Gurtob said so. Go da fastest, grab da toadies, throw da toadies, trick da jubblies, eat da jubblies. Dat's it.
